extra.reason: Created tests/table_index_tests.rs with 47 passing tests covering table CRUD, scans, index operations (Bloom, R-Tree, TimeSeries, FullText, Graph), table+index integration, composite index patterns, concurrent access, error handling, edge cases, property-based invariants, and performance benchmarks. 2 tests ignored for known issues (HNSW node loading nanokv-w5o, drop_table engine registry cleanup).
Replaced bincode with postcard across all serialization points in sstable, manifest, btree, and fulltext modules. All relevant tests pass.

Implemented node loading and storage using page-based persistence. Added serialize_node/deserialize_node for binary serialization, store_node/ update_node for page storage, load_node for page retrieval, connect_nodes for bidirectional graph connections, and prune_connections for connection limit enforcement. Fixed insert_vector to store node once and update in place. All 5 HNSW tests pass.
SSTable writer footer bug was already fixed. Removed #[ignore] attributes from test_data_persistence_lsm_table and test_mixed_operations_with_persistence tests. All 10 integration tests now pass.
Fixed

Enabled test_compaction in lsm_tree_integration_tests.rs. The test creates a Version with L0 files exceeding size limits, uses CompactionPicker to select a compaction job, and verifies compaction job properties including source/target levels, file counts, priority, and estimated output size.
Implemented test_bloom_filter_operations test using existing BloomFilter insert/contains methods and BloomFilterBuilder
Completed
Implemented test_lsm_mvcc with comprehensive MVCC snapshot isolation tests covering version visibility at different LSNs, tombstone/deletion visibility, and multi-key version scenarios
Implemented test_memtable_operations test with insert, get, and delete operations using the fully exposed Memtable API

Fixed FullText apply during transaction commit by changing FullTextSearch trait methods from &mut self to &self (implementation already uses RwLock for interior mutability). Enabled the commented-out apply code in transaction commit. Changed fulltext_write_set to use RwLock for interior mutability.
Completed
Completed MVCC integration with pending_changes pattern, flush(), and commit_versions()

Added commit_versions method to MemoryARTWriter and integrated it into the transaction commit path. MVCC version chains are now properly committed after flush, making changes visible to readers at transaction commit time.
Implemented MVCC version chain integration with PagedBTree. Versions are now left uncommitted during flush() and marked visible via commit_versions() at transaction commit time.

Completed: Added centralized commit_versions() calls for all modified tables in Transaction::commit(). Version chains are now properly marked as committed after WAL commit, making changes visible to readers. All 358 tests pass.

Completed MemoryGraphTable MVCC integration. Fixed commit_versions to properly commit all versions in version chains, separated outgoing/incoming edge indices, and verified all 8 graph MVCC tests pass.

Completed TimeSeriesTable MVCC integration. Added VersionChain support to TimeBucket storage, implemented transaction-aware methods (append_point_tx, scan_series_snapshot, latest_before_snapshot), added commit_versions() and vacuum() methods. Created comprehensive MVCC tests. Updated documentation. Follow-up issue nanokv-n22 created for updating persistence tests.

Updated all timeseries_persistence_tests.rs tests to use the new MVCC-aware API. Added helper functions for creating snapshots and transaction IDs. Updated all 27 tests to properly commit versions after inserting data so they become visible to snapshots. All tests now pass successfully.
Implemented vacuum() methods for all table engines that use VersionChain

Vacuum/GC infrastructure complete. All core components implemented and tested: min_visible_lsn watermark, vacuum_table/vacuum_all APIs, engine dispatcher, and vacuum() methods in all table engines. Follow-up work (background task, metrics, comprehensive tests) tracked in nanokv-mkk and nanokv-914.

Completed comprehensive MVCC snapshot isolation test suite with 12 passing tests covering basic isolation, conflicts, long-running transactions, and cross-table visibility. Created detailed coverage analysis document. Deferred read-committed vs snapshot isolation tests (needs isolation level API) and additional vacuum tests (basic coverage exists).
